title: スプリンターズSにむけて

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
The Sprinters Stakes is here! I'm ready to unleash
everything I've got out there and leave my mark
on Nakayama!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Helios may burn like the sun, but I'm not gonna let her win! I'm the one who's going to stand at the summit of sprints!
